properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My physicians tried in vain For twelve long years of pain Is proof that there is nothing they can do But I just heard somebody say "There's a healer on the way" Somehow I have to press my way through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've gotta get to Jesus Gotta get to Jesus I know that He's the answer to my needs Bring Him all my problems Only He can solve them Mend the broken pieces Gotta get to Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When my world is torn apart I need healing for my heart I really don't know how much more I can take Trapped inside a cloud of disbelief and doubt I only know one way of escape

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If the hem of His garment is all I can reach I know if I touch Him I will be free I will be free
